message:
Fix cpp plugin versioning to start at v0.1.0

Retroactively adjust version numbers:
- v0.2.0 → v0.1.0 (clangd integration)
- v0.3.0 → v0.2.0 (coding conventions)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@ intro: >-
 modules:
   brand: v1.0.0
   changelog: v1.4.1
-  cpp: v0.3.0
+  cpp: v0.2.0
   docs: v2.2.0
   excalidraw: v0.1.0
   formatter: v1.1.1

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "cpp",
-  "version": "0.3.0",
+  "version": "0.2.0",
   "description": "C++ language support, tooling, and coding conventions",
   "author": {
     "name": "Tenzir",

@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+created: 2025-12-28
+title: clangd Language Server Integration
+intro: >-
+  This release introduces a new C++ plugin with clangd language server integration,
+  providing go-to-definition, find-references, hover information, and diagnostics
+  for C++ development.

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+This release introduces a new C++ plugin with clangd language server integration, providing go-to-definition, find-references, hover information, and diagnostics for C++ development.
+
+## 🚀 Features
+
+### C++ plugin with clangd language server integration
+
+Adds a new plugin for C++ development with clangd as the language server. The plugin provides go-to-definition, find-references, hover information, and diagnostics.
+
+*By @mavam and @claude.*

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
-created: 2025-12-28
-title: clangd Language Server Integration
+created: 2026-01-04
+title: C++ Coding Conventions
 intro: >-
-  This release introduces a new C++ plugin with clangd language server integration,
-  providing go-to-definition, find-references, hover information, and diagnostics
-  for C++ development.
+  This release adds a comprehensive C++ coding conventions skill that provides guidance
+  on naming conventions, class structure, template metaprogramming style, and documentation
+  comments.

@@ -1,9 +1,9 @@
-This release introduces a new C++ plugin with clangd language server integration, providing go-to-definition, find-references, hover information, and diagnostics for C++ development.
+This release adds a comprehensive C++ coding conventions skill that provides guidance on naming conventions, class structure, template metaprogramming style, and documentation comments.
 
 ## 🚀 Features
 
-### C++ plugin with clangd language server integration
+### C++ coding conventions skill
 
-Adds a new plugin for C++ development with clangd as the language server. The plugin provides go-to-definition, find-references, hover information, and diagnostics.
+Adds a `following-conventions` skill that encodes general C++ coding conventions: naming, class structure, template metaprogramming style, and documentation comments.
 
-*By @mavam and @claude.*
+*By @mavam, @jachris, and @claude in #3.*

@@ -1,6 +0,0 @@
-created: 2026-01-04
-title: C++ Coding Conventions
-intro: >-
-  This release adds a comprehensive C++ coding conventions skill that provides guidance
-  on naming conventions, class structure, template metaprogramming style, and documentation
-  comments.

@@ -1,9 +0,0 @@
-This release adds a comprehensive C++ coding conventions skill that provides guidance on naming conventions, class structure, template metaprogramming style, and documentation comments.
-
-## 🚀 Features
-
-### C++ coding conventions skill
-
-Adds a `following-conventions` skill that encodes general C++ coding conventions: naming, class structure, template metaprogramming style, and documentation comments.
-
-*By @mavam, @jachris, and @claude in #3.*
